series_metadata.series_description: Record that document claims and litigation against RSC. Records may include: correspondence, court pleadings, court notices and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: five (5) federal fiscal years from date of final determination or when case is deemed closed. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: five (5) federal fiscal years from date of final determination or when case is deemed closed. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records
